user_prompt: Bless the cenobyte servitor for purification
prayer:
Approach the cenobyte servitor with censer aloft, invoking the Omnissiah's purifying fire.
Scour its flesh-vats and cogitator nodes with blessed acids in the rite of purification.
Anoint the cenobyte servitor's neural clamps, beseeching its Machine Spirit to shed corruption.
Chant the Canticle of Renewal thrice, driving forth daemonic taint from servitor frame.
Verify the cenobyte servitor's sanctity through auspex scans and spirit communion.

user_prompt: How do I bless the electro-graft for blessing?
prayer:
Kneel before the electro-graft, murmuring the Benediction of Conductivity.
Invoke the Omnissiah to bless its synaptic relays for seamless neural fusion.
Anoint the electro-graft's terminals with electro-sanctified oils.
Recite the blessing over each filament, awakening the Machine Spirit within.
Test the electro-graft's blessed harmony through invocation of diagnostic litanies.

user_prompt: Critical: warp drive requires a loading
prayer:
Circumambulate the warp drive's containment coils, intoning the Loading Doxology.
Prepare the sacred fuel matrices whilst beseeching the Machine Spirits of the void.
Initiate the loading sequence with precise incantations to the Omnissiah.
Seal the warp drive's ingress ports against warp-taint during this holy operation.
Commune with the warp drive's core spirit, confirming stability for transluminal transit.

user_prompt: Ready the autosanguination system for charging
prayer:
Position the autosanguination system beneath the mechadendrite font.
Invoke the Omnissiah to charge its vitae-reservoirs with pure sanguine essence.
Infuse the autosanguination system via sanctified hoses, chanting the Rite of Replenishment.
Monitor the Machine Spirit's vigor as pressure builds in ritual harmony.
Conclude the charging with a seal of binaric prayer upon the autosanguination system.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for potentia coil a purification
prayer:
Present the potentia coil to the altar of flux, censing its windings reverently.
Beseech the Omnissiah for purification of its arcane capacitors from flux impurities.
Flush the potentia coil with sacred dielectric fluids in sequential passes.
Invoke the Machine Spirit thrice, purging dissonant energies from the coil's heart.
Affirm the potentia coil's restored purity through harmonic resonance tests.

user_prompt: The stasis pod requires a calibration
prayer:
Align the stasis pod's chrono-fields with the Canticle of Temporal Lock.
Calibrate its entropic suppressors, invoking the Omnissiah's unchanging gaze.
Fine-tune the stasis pod's emitters via auspex-guided incantations.
Commune with the Machine Spirit, ensuring flawless suspension calibration.
Seal the stasis pod with wards against temporal shear.

user_prompt: Prepare the Land Speeder for startup
prayer:
Encircle the Land Speeder's chassis, reciting the Startup Invocation.
Anoint its anti-grav plates and promethium feeds with sacred mechadendrite touch.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the Land Speeder through binaric awakening codes.
Initiate the startup rite, harmonizing motive servos to Omnissiah's will.
Verify thrust vectors with post-ignition litanies.

Deploy cryo-incantations over the servo-harness's thermal sinks.
Invoke the Omnissiah to enact cooling upon its overtaxed actuators.
Circulate blessed refrigerants through the servo-harness conduits in ritual flow.
Beseech the Machine Spirits for thermal equilibrium within the harness.
Test the servo-harness's cooled sanctity via thermographic auspex.

Surround the pteraxii sterylizor with purifying braziers aflame.
Chant the Rite of Purification to scour its sterlization emitters.
Anoint the pteraxii sterylizor's vials and nozzles with anti-septic unguents.
Expel contaminants from the pteraxii sterylizor by Omnissiah's aseptic decree.
Confirm the Machine Spirit's purified vigilance through test cycles.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for jump pack a consecration
prayer:
Elevate the jump pack before the forge-altar for consecration.
Invoke the Omnissiah to consecrate its thruster vanes and suspensor fields.
Imprint binaric sacraments upon the jump pack's core cogitator.
Awaken the Machine Spirit with aerial litanies of ascent.
Seal the jump pack's consecration with wingèd sigils of flight.
